name: Quinoa, Leek and Tofu Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Squeeze out water from half a cup of tofu using your hands. Set aside.
3. Heat sesame oil in a large skillet or wok.
4. Add garlic and leek, and sauté until lightly browned.
5. Add quinoa, then tofu, stirring for 2 minutes after each addition.
6. Stir in seasonings (sea salt or shoyu and black pepper).
7. Oil a casserole dish and sprinkle half the bread crumbs evenly on the bottom.
8. Gently pour the quinoa mixture into the dish.
9. Press a well in the center of the quinoa and pour in soymilk.
10. Sprinkle remaining bread crumbs over the top.
11. Cover with foil and bake for 20 minutes.
12. Remove foil and continue baking for an additional 10 minutes.
